parameters.prompt: One photorealistic modular orbital-station corridor wall bay, exactly 2.4 m wide, 2.6 m high and 0.32 m deep. Heavy structural side posts, replaceable white service panels, recessed utility chase, ventilation grille, equipment locker, handrail, task-light recesses, pressure seals, service fasteners and realistic bevels. Flat rear mounting plane and clear floor edge, isolated single object, visible face +Z. No doorway, floor, ceiling, room, exposed loose wires, text, logo, stand, ground, or background.
parameters.texture_prompt: De-lit civic-industrial station materials: zinc-gray structural alloy, off-white replaceable panels, dark non-slip lower kick plate, brushed steel rail, restrained amber wayfinding accents, plausible maintenance wear, no baked lighting, pseudo-text, logos, random grime, or emissive glow.

reasons: geometry is a nearly cubic equipment block rather than a shallow corridor wall bay
depth is comparable to width and height and would consume the protected walking envelope
art_review.possible_reuse: untextured station equipment or cargo-block geometry study
